label: professional_details
value: Started taking evening shifts at the hospital to manage work and personal life better, part of a new shift rotation system aimed at reducing burnout.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Considering strategies for managing evening shifts and volunteer work, including using calendars for scheduling, prioritizing tasks, communicating with supervisor, swapping shifts, ensuring adequate sleep, taking naps, packing healthy meals, staying hydrated, using mindfulness apps like Headspace, Calm, Insight Timer, Breathe2Relax, Stop, Breathe & Think, Sleep Cycle, Pzizz, Yoga Wake Up, Daily Burn, Sanvello, and Talkspace, practicing quick stress-relief techniques, connecting with peer support, engaging with community groups, applying nursing skills in volunteer work, leading educational workshops, attending networking events, collaborating with other organizations, and regularly evaluating balance between commitments.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Switched from a strict vegetarian diet to a flexitarian one, emphasizing plant-based foods but now includes lean meats and fish.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in recent articles and books on medical technology and patient stories

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in quick and easy meal prep ideas that align with the flexitarian diet to streamline meal preparation without sacrificing nutritional value.

label: important_personal_details
value: Joined a local educational support group that mentors underprivileged children, feels rewarding and complements interest in community health.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Exploring upcoming environmental projects and volunteer opportunities, interested in beach clean-ups, tree planting initiatives, community education workshops, river and creek clean-ups, marine debris monitoring, restoration projects, Earth Day activities, World Oceans Day events, seasonal conservation efforts, joining online forums and groups, partnering with schools and universities.
